home.metaTitle: Atelier BCI — Professional masks, ampoules & powders
home.metaDesc: Europe's specialist in professional single-dose masks, ampoules and powders. Trade-only.
home.heroTitle: Europe's specialist in professional masks, ampoules & powders.
home.heroSub: 20+ years of high-performance formulas. Trade-only — supplied to manufacturers, importers and wholesalers worldwide.
home.whoText: Atelier BCI is an internationally operating niche firm, specialising in high-performance professional cosmetic treatments. We develop, manufacture, and market our formulas to manufacturers, importers, and wholesalers worldwide.
home.masksDesc: Single-dose professional face masks. High-performance actives, immediate results.
home.ampoulesDesc: Concentrated treatment ampoules. Rapid absorption, measurable results.
home.powdersDesc: Specialty treatment powders. Consistent, precise, single-dose.
home.formulasNote: All products available under Atelier BCI label or private label for qualified trade partners. Minimum order quantities apply.
home.row1Text: Every formula is packaged for one treatment. Hygienic, practical, consistent.
home.row2Text: Atelier BCI supplies exclusively to manufacturers, importers, and wholesalers. Discretion is standard.
home.orderSub: We operate on a trade invoice model. Browse our range and request a quote — we respond within one business day.

products.metaDesc: Professional single-dose masks, ampoules and powders for trade partners.
products.title: The Formulas
products.subtitle: Professional treatments. Single-dose precision.

hydraMask.name: Hydra Replenish Mask
hydraMask.desc: Intensive single-dose hydration mask with hyaluronic complex.

purifyMask.name: Purify Clay Mask
purifyMask.desc: Deep-cleansing kaolin mask for combination and oily skin.

liftMask.name: Lift Contour Mask
liftMask.desc: Firming mask with peptide complex for visible lift.

vitcAmp.name: Vitamin C Ampoule
vitcAmp.desc: Stabilised 10% L-ascorbic concentrate for radiance and tone.

retinolAmp.name: Retinol Renewal Ampoule
retinolAmp.desc: Encapsulated retinol for nightly cellular renewal.

haAmp.name: Hyaluronic Boost Ampoule
haAmp.desc: Multi-weight hyaluronic acid for deep plumping.

enzymePowder.name: Enzyme Polish Powder
enzymePowder.desc: Activated enzyme powder for gentle weekly resurfacing.

collagenPowder.name: Collagen Recovery Powder
collagenPowder.desc: Marine collagen powder for post-treatment recovery.

mineralPowder.name: Mineral Detox Powder
mineralPowder.desc: Mineral-rich detox powder for clarifying treatments.

about.metaDesc: Atelier BCI: 20+ years of professional cosmetic formulas, made in Europe.
about.title: About Atelier BCI
about.s1Text: Atelier BCI is an internationally operating niche firm with over 20 years of experience in high-performance cosmetic treatments. We develop, manufacture, and market professional masks, ampoules, and powders.
about.s2Text: We use only the newest and finest active ingredients. Speed of action and ease of use are central to every formula.
about.s3Text: Our clients include renowned manufacturers, importers, and wholesalers in the international cosmetics market. Discretion is not a promise — it is a given.
about.s4Caption: Primarily serving Europe, with global reach.

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with Atelier BCI in Bloemendaal, the Netherlands.

contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thank you. Your message is ready in your mail client.
contact.tradeNote: Atelier BCI works exclusively with trade partners. For consumer inquiries, visit our consumer page.
